sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ سَعِيدٌ أَنْ يَعْرِفَ طَقْسَ الْغَدِ.
sentences.translation: Saeed je htio znati kakvo je sutra vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Saeed wanted to know tomorrow's weather.

sentences.translation: Otvorio je aplikaciju za vremenske prilike na telefonu.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the weather app on his phone.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى أَنَّ الْغَدَ سَيَكُونُ مُشْمِسًا وَحَارًّا.
sentences.translation: Vidio je da će sutra biti sunčano i vruće.
sentences.translationEn: He saw that tomorrow will be sunny and hot.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَأْخُذَ مَعَهُ مَاءً كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je ponijeti sa sobom puno vode.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to take a lot of water with him.
